Name.jp: ペンギン海賊・バブル

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象を<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to grant an <color=#28d9ed>extra turn</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 획득합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率获得<color=#28d9ed>额外\n回合</color>。

name.jp: うるさいけど当たって...
name.zh: 虽然有点吵......但请配合一下......

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGreatly increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間大幅にUPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 크게 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>大幅提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
